Trigger.name: Gating
Trigger.script:
local code = matches[2]
weaving = weaving or {} gatecodes = {}
if weaving.name then if io.exists(f"{getMudletHomeDir()}/{weaving.name}_gatecodes.lua") then table.load(f"{getMudletHomeDir()}/{weaving.name}_gatecodes.lua", gatecodes) end if weaving.gatename then gatecodes[weaving.gatename] = code table.save(f"{getMudletHomeDir()}/{weaving.name}_gatecodes.lua", gatecodes) cecho(f"
<green>Code '{code}' successfully stored to location '{weaving.gatename}'.") else cecho("
<red>Unknown error! No location set to store code to.") end send("release") else cecho("
<red>Error! Character name not known.") end

regexCodeList.string: You concentrate and a bright slash of light dilates into a gateway to another place.

Trigger.name: Look portal

Alias.name: Make gate
Alias.script:
--syntax: makegate xxx
weaving = weaving or {}
weaving.gatename = matches[2]
if weaving.sex == "female" then sendAll("embrace", "channel 'gate'") elseif weaving.sex == "male" then sendAll("seize", "channel 'gate'") else cecho("<red>Error! Character sex not known.\n") end

Alias.name: Gate to
Alias.script:
--syntax: gate xxx
local location = matches[2]
weaving = weaving or {} gatecodes = {}
if weaving.name then if io.exists(f"{getMudletHomeDir()}/{weaving.name}_gatecodes.lua") then table.load(f"{getMudletHomeDir()}/{weaving.name}_gatecodes.lua", gatecodes) end if gatecodes[location] then if weaving.sex == "female" then sendAll("embrace", f"channel 'gate' {gatecodes[location]}") elseif weaving.sex == "male" then sendAll("seize", f"channel 'gate' {gatecodes[location]}") else cecho("<red>Error! Character sex not known.\n") end else cecho("<red>Unknown error! No code known for this location.\n") end else cecho("<red>Error! Character name not known.\n") end

Alias.name: Delete gates
View codes
ONETIME ADD OLD CODES
